title: Amtra Crystal Globe - Fishbowl in transparent glass, Goldfish Aquarium, hand blown, 30 CM
features: PACKAGE CONTENTS: Goldfish bowl in transparent glass, with a diameter of 30 CM.
SAFE AND VERSATILE: Fish tank made with quality glass and resistant to shocks.
HAND-BLOWN GLASS: The bowl is in hand-blown crystal.
USE: The aquarium is ideal for hosting small fish, invertebrates or plants.
FREE YOUR CREATIVITY: This tank is an excellent starting point for your aquarium or terrarium, which you can compose as you like without having to buy accessories that do not meet your needs
description: Product Description hand blown glass bowl Box Contains CRYSTAL GLOBE 30
